2606.16783.title: Gen-VCoT: Generative Visual Chain-of-Thought Reasoning via Diffusion-Based RGB Intermediate Representations
2606.16783.paper_summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) excel at visual reasoning but rely on text-based chain-of-thought (CoT), lacking interpretable visual intermediates. Existing methods use opaque tokens or external tools, missing key properties. We propose Gen-VCoT, a framework using expert vision models to generate RGB images as reasoning intermediates. It has three stages: visual grounding (SAM segmentation), geometric reasoning (Marigold depth maps), and semantic reasoning (Qwen2-VL integration). An adaptive router selects reasoning depth. Evaluations show Gen-VCoT improves spatial (25% better) and depth (50% better) questions, but may hurt simple factual queries. Text CoT outperforms visual intermediates on CLEVR (91.2% vs 62.5%), showing task-dependent optimal representations. Gen-VCoT establishes a new paradigm for interpretable multimodal reasoning.
2606.16783.paper_summary_zh: 多模態大型語言模型（MLLMs）在視覺推理方面表現優異，但依賴基於文本的思維鏈（CoT），缺乏可解釋的視覺中介。現有方法使用不透明的標記或外部工具，缺失關鍵特性。我們提出了Gen-VCoT，一個使用專家視覺模型生成RGB圖像作為推理中介的框架。它有三個階段：視覺基礎（SAM分割）、幾何推理（Marigold深度圖）和語義推理（Qwen2-VL整合）。一個自適應路由器選擇推理深度。評估顯示Gen-VCoT在空間（提高25%）和深度（提高50%）問題上有所改善，但可能會影響簡單的事實查詢。文本CoT在CLEVR上表現優於視覺中介（91.2%對62.5%），顯示出任務依賴的最佳表徵。Gen-VCoT建立了一個可解釋的多模態推理的新範式。
2606.16783.author: Zhiqiang Zhou et.al.
2606.16783.authors: Zhiqiang Zhou, Junliang Dai, Xu ling
